title: onobrychis sulphurea
intro: Onobrychis sulphurea, also known as yellow melilot or honey clover, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to have medicinal uses in treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Onobrychis sulphurea include its ability to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
